title: mentha longifolia var. ligustrina
intro: Mentha longifolia var. ligustrina, also known as Woolly Mint or Woolly Horsemint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial qualities, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. ligustrina include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
